label: Fixes
items: Nursery — you can now edit a packet after creating it. Open any packet → tap the new Edit pill at the bottom. Change the linked Shed plant (the bit that was missing), or fix the variety / vendor / dates / quantity / notes.

Nursery — when a germinated sowing can't be planted out because the packet isn't linked to a Shed plant, you now see a clear amber "Link plant to plant out" button instead of a greyed-out one. Tap it and the editor opens straight to the plant picker.
